Dish

S- Series Compact Adjustable Dish Caddies | Cambro

The Compact Adjustable Dish Caddy S-Series offers a smaller footprint without compromising performance or storage capacity. Save floor space or fit more caddies in the same amount of space with this compact design, ideal for restaurants and hotels. The Patented CamLever Towers conveniently adjust from the top, making it easy to modify the towers for new dish sizes. The lightweight, open wall design supported by four swivel casters makes maneuvering and accessing plates from all sides easy. Available with 4, 8 and 12 towers for added versatility. Choose the ADCSC to level up your warewashing with a dish caddy backed by Cambro durability!

£909.00/ day
